arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou names three Spurs players who could now fill in for Son Heung-min including 'fantastic' teenager
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently sweating on the fitness of Son Heung-min, who picked up a knock on Thursday night. Spurs hosted Qarabag in their Europa...

arts.ttl: REVEALED: The year Man Utd 'aim to win' 14th Premier League title
arts.sum: The Athletic report that one extra year has been added to that target, with Berrada stressing a desire to mark the club's 150th anniversary with a first Premier League title win since 2012/13 under Sir Alex Ferguson. The aptly named 'Project 150' sets out a long-term plan to make United competitive over the next few years and put them into a position of sufficient strength to win the title 150 years after the club was founded in 1878.

arts.ttl: 'Exposed': Jamie Carragher claims Ange Postecoglou is making two Tottenham players look worse than they are
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has told Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou that he might be making two of his best players look worse than they actually are. Spurs...

arts.ttl: Man Utd haven't learnt their lessons - they will forever be playing catch-up under Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe shelled out £180million on new players in the summer to back Erik ten Hag, only for Manchester United to continue to disappoint - something has to give

arts.ttl: Man Utd prefer Mount over 'once-in-a-century' superstar
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala is a 'once-in-a-century' footballer, according to Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer. Bayern are confident of tying Musiala down to fresh terms, though they are well aware that he is of interest to pretty much every major club around Europe.

Ange was asked three questions on the challenge of facing United at Old Trafford - here they are... FC Twente got a draw on Wednesday, United legends say Old Trafford is not as scary as it used to be, is it?

arts.ttl: Latest Man United injury news as four miss Tottenham with Erik ten Hag advantage clear
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United injury news as Erik ten Hag goes into Sunday's game without four players due to injury

arts.ttl: Chelsea & Man Utd join race for 'new Angel Di Maria'
arts.sum: Fernandez signed a contract extension at Velez back in April 2023, but his current deal is due to expire at the end of December 2025 and he is likely to be on the move next year as a result. Chelsea and Manchester United are reportedly among the clubs interested in signing Velez Sarsfield youngster Thiago Fernandez.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss gives Son Heung-min injury update and speaks out on forward's future
arts.sum: Son was forced off during Thursday night's Europa League win over Qarabag but will be given a chance to prove his fitness ahead of the trip to Old Trafford
